original_query: SELECT MAX(DISTINCT l_orderkey) FROM lineitem WHERE EXISTS (SELECT MAX(c_custkey) FROM customer WHERE c_custkey=l_orderkey GROUP BY c_custkey);
rewritten_query: SELECT MAX(l_orderkey) FROM lineitem WHERE l_orderkey IN (SELECT c_custkey FROM customer);
agent_analysis: The original query uses MAX(DISTINCT l_orderkey) which is not necessary since MAX already returns the highest value. Additionally, the EXISTS clause can be replaced with an IN clause, which can be more efficient in this context. The subquery can be simplified to just return the c_custkey values directly, avoiding the need for MAX in the subquery.
